subject: Show star ratings on product cards
request_description: I wish I could see the star rating on the product grid without having to click into each product. Makes it hard to compare at a glance.

subject: Can't find a search bar
request_description: Is there a way to search for specific products? I couldn't find a search field on the homepage.

subject: Display average rating in product listings
request_description: Please add average star ratings to the product listing page. I use ratings to decide what to click on and right now I have to open every product individually.

subject: Wishlist or save for later
request_description: Would love a wishlist feature so I can save products I'm interested in and come back later.

subject: Featured product should show its rating
request_description: The big featured product at the top of the homepage looks great but I have no idea how well-reviewed it is. Can you show the star rating there too?

subject: Filter products by price
request_description: It would be really helpful to filter products by price range on the homepage.

subject: Search by product name
request_description: Please add a search field so I can type a product name instead of scrolling through everything.

subject: Star ratings not visible when browsing
request_description: I only noticed there were reviews at all because I accidentally clicked into a product. The rating should be front and center on each card.

subject: Product comparison feature
request_description: Would be great to select two or three products and compare specs side by side.

subject: Show ratings before I click through
request_description: I keep having to go into each product just to check the reviews. A summary star rating on the listing cards would save a lot of time.

subject: In-stock email notifications
request_description: Can you add a "notify me when back in stock" option? The Trail Pack is out of stock and I'd love to know when it's available again.

subject: Add rating to product cards on homepage
request_description: Simple request: please show the average star rating on the product cards on the homepage. That's the main thing I look for when shopping online.

subject: Discount codes at checkout
request_description: Do you have any discount or promo codes? I couldn't find a place to enter one at checkout.

subject: Metric and imperial dimensions
request_description: Could you show product dimensions in both cm and inches? I kept having to convert the measurements.

subject: Rating summary on all product pages
request_description: The rating stars only show up in individual reviews. Can you show a single average score at the top of the product card for quick reference?

subject: Homepage search bar for quicker browsing
request_description: Finding items is slow right now. A simple search bar on the homepage would make shopping much faster.

subject: Dark mode support
request_description: Any plans for a dark mode? I shop late at night and the bright white background is pretty harsh.

subject: Show review count alongside stars
request_description: If you do add star ratings to the product cards please also show the number of reviews so I know how reliable the score is.

subject: Gift note option at checkout
request_description: I'm buying these as gifts and would love the option to include a handwritten note or gift message.

subject: Product recommendations
request_description: After adding something to my cart it would be nice to see "you might also like" suggestions based on what I'm buying.

subject: Visible star rating on product detail page
request_description: I noticed the reviews are all the way at the bottom of the product page. Can you move or repeat the average rating score near the top by the price?

subject: Bundle deals or multi-item discounts
request_description: Would love to see bundle pricing — like buying the bottle and the mug together for a small discount.

subject: Search products by keyword
request_description: Would love to search by keyword like "bottle" or "lamp" to find products quickly.
